response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Nest.js, aligning strongly with the role requirements. His work on scalable platforms, REST APIs, and relational databases (MongoDB/SQL) demonstrates practical expertise. While his background leans toward senior-level roles, his adaptability and recent fullstack contributions justify an interview. Concerns include potential overqualification and limited direct PostgreSQL experience.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple companies and projects
Strong background in scalable architectures, REST APIs, and relational databases
Proven ability to deliver production-grade solutions in diverse domains (renewable energy, automation, GIS)
concerns: Likely overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, potentially leading to retention risks
Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience compared to other relational databases
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his preference for diverse, high-impact projects
